summary.concern: Stephanie and Marc Felton — 13 overdue tasks

paragraphs: Overdue climbed to 68 — we need to reverse this today. This is above the 7-day average of 62 — the trend is heading the wrong direction.

**Stephanie and Marc Felton:** The oldest overdue task is 27 days past due with 13 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **8 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** The oldest overdue task is 24 days past due with 13 total — this has been stuck for days. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **6 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 4 payment tasks due this week.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** The oldest overdue task is 13 days past due with 12 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **9 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 11 payment tasks due this week.

**Ginger Brown:** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 10 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **14 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late. 3 payment tasks due this week.
**Kyle Aubry - Project 01:** Overdue count is climbing — now at 9. The PM needs to get ahead of this before it cascades. **7 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** The oldest overdue task is 15 days past due with 7 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **3 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

**Rohini Williams (CNG2025-496):** The oldest overdue task is 16 days past due with 4 total — this schedule needs a reset. PM should update dates on tasks that have truly slipped rather than letting false overdues pile up. **10 upcoming tasks unassigned** — assign people now or they'll start late.

126 tasks starting in the next 7 days. **59 of those have nobody assigned** — these need a name on them before they're due or they'll become overdue with no accountability. 45 overdue payments are holding up the pipeline — every day these sit, the schedule slips further. **$0 in payments going out this week** across 25 tasks — make sure funds are available. Heavy week ahead for Ginger Brown and Clifford Clack — Gym Addition — make sure resources are lined up.

Angel Pacheco: Angel Pacheco is trending in the right direction — overdue is down to 23. Keep the momentum going.

**Katie Holmes & Sean Springs:** 13 overdue (oldest: 24d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **6 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 22 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Clifford Clack — Gym Addition:** 12 overdue (oldest: 13d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. **9 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 26 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.

**Lingyan Qiu (CNG2025-458):** 7 overdue (oldest: 15d) — review and reschedule tasks that have truly slipped. 1 task blocked by payments — escalate, not on you. **3 upcoming unassigned** — assign before they start. 15 tasks starting this week — make sure subs and materials are confirmed.
**CANDACE - JUSTIN P REFERRAL (CNG2025-522):** 2 payment tasks need Operations attention.
**Recommendation:** Block 2 hours today to clear the oldest overdue tasks first. If a task is genuinely behind and can't be completed soon, update the schedule dates so we have accurate data.
